title: You Break It, You Own It? Not for Trump When It Comes to Iran
author: Anton Troianovski
fullText: “We’ll see what happens with the people,” President Trump said as he appeared to be distancing himself from the longer-term consequences of the war in Iran.
summary: “We’ll see what happens with the people,” President Trump said as he appeared to be distancing himself from the longer-term consequences of the war in Iran.
